spec_match.rationale: Uses requestWindow({ copyStyleSheets: true }) to launch a Document PiP and shows the inherited styling — the spec's headline addition.

interactive.rationale: Toggle option + open-PiP button; the popout actually fires.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises copyStyleSheets toggle with visible difference — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't probe what happens with constructed stylesheets (CSSStyleSheet objects added via adoptedStyleSheets) — these have different copy semantics than <link>/<style> sheets.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables used; popout content visibly inherits design system tokens.

openQuestions.title: Probe adoptedStyleSheets behaviour
openQuestions.detail: Constructed stylesheets attached via document.adoptedStyleSheets are not copied the same way as <link> / <style>. Add a probe with a constructed CSSStyleSheet and verify the result in the PiP window.

openQuestions.title: Show late-added stylesheets
openQuestions.detail: If the opener adds a stylesheet AFTER opening the PiP, does the PiP get the update? Probe this by injecting a <style> after the popout exists.

summary: Clean copyStyleSheets toggle demo with real popout. Could probe adoptedStyleSheets and late-added sheet edge cases.
